rationale: The citing paper references Aribarg and Schwartz (2020) in grouped citations as part of a broad review of deceptive ad formats, and later as an example of prior work using click-throughs as an outcome metric. The citing study does not build its identification strategy, framework, hypotheses, or interpretation specifically on this paper, nor does it engage its specific trade-off findings. The citation functions as contextual background rather than a paper-specific intellectual dependency.
